name: Beth Stelling
bio: Beth Stelling is an American stand-up comedian and writer known for her conversational, deadpan style and candid material about family, dating, and her own life. She wrote for the HBO series Crashing and appeared in Netflix's The Standups. Her work includes the albums Sweet Beth and Simply the Beth and the specials Girl Daddy and If You Didn't Want Me Then.

timeline.ev: HBO Max special Girl Daddy premieres
Netflix special If You Didn't Want Me Then released

accolades: Named a Comedian to Watch by Out magazine (2016)
Two specials: Girl Daddy (HBO Max) and If You Didn't Want Me Then (Netflix)

specials.t: If You Didn't Want Me Then
